# Maintenance Task

Use this for refactors, documentation upkeep, tests, dependency hygiene, CI maintenance, or small operational cleanup.

## Summary

One or two sentences.

## Maintenance category

- [ ] readability / refactor
- [ ] tests
- [ ] documentation
- [ ] CI / release
- [ ] dependency hygiene
- [ ] other:

## Affected files / areas

Likely files or packages.

## Reason

Why this maintenance is useful now.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] ...
- [ ] ...
- [ ] ...

## Validation commands

- [ ] `cd server && gofmt -w .`
- [ ] `cd server && go test ./...`
- [ ] `cd server && go vet ./...`, if practical
- [ ] docs-only review, if only Markdown changes

## Out of scope

What this task should not include.
